summary: Iteration 10: Implant Selection Module FDI Chart and 4-Step Flow - Complete E2E testing passed. All backend APIs (12/12) and frontend features (all 12 requested) verified working correctly.

issues: Minor: Outer teeth (17, 27, 37, 47) slightly clipped on edges - noted as known issue by main agent

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: GET /api/implant-library/tooth-recommendations returns all 28 FDI teeth correctly
Backend: GET /api/implant-library/tooth-recommendations/46 returns correct diameter [4.5, 5.0] and length [10, 12]
Backend: GET /api/implant-library/suggest with tooth parameter correctly returns tooth_recommendation in response
Backend: GET /api/implant-library/suggest without tooth parameter still works (backward compat verified)
Backend: GET /api/implant-library/systems returns 18 systems as expected
Frontend: data-testid attributes properly implemented for tooth-46, system-dropdown, system-option-N, bone-width-input, bone-height-input, suggest-btn, copy-recommendation-btn
Frontend: 4-step flow indicator shows checkmarks for completed steps and highlights current step
Frontend: FDI chart properly displays Upper Jaw (Maxillary) and Lower Jaw (Mandibular) with Right/Left labels
Frontend: Tooth selection shows recommendation info box with region, diameter range, length range
Frontend: System dropdown is disabled until tooth selected (conditional rendering working)
Frontend: Modal for system selection shows all 18 systems from API with scrollable list
Frontend: Bone measurements inputs are disabled until system selected
Frontend: Find Implant button triggers API call and displays comprehensive results
Frontend: Results include tooth_recommendation, clinical_guidance, best_matches, all_options
Frontend: 'Add Implant to Case' button copies recommendation to clipboard
Frontend: 'New Selection' button resets the entire flow
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 72-record implant library with 18 systems and 28 tooth recommendations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Implant Selection module fully tested with new FDI chart and 4-step flow. All testId attributes are in place for automated testing. The flow is: 1) Select tooth from FDI chart → shows tooth recommendation info box, 2) Select implant system from modal dropdown (18 options), 3) Enter bone width and height measurements, 4) Click Find Implant → shows results with clinical guidance, best matches, all available sizes, and copy-to-clipboard button.

backend_apis.3_suggest_with_tooth_returns_tooth_recom: PASS - tooth_recommendation object present in response

frontend_features.1_four_step_indicator: PASS - Tooth, System, Bone, Result steps with progress visualization
frontend_features.2_fdi_chart_upper_lower_jaw: PASS - Both maxillary and mandibular teeth displayed
frontend_features.3_tooth_selection_shows_info_box: PASS - Shows region, diameter range, length range
frontend_features.5_system_dropdown_modal_opens: PASS - Modal shows scrollable list of 18 systems
frontend_features.7_find_implant_button_triggers_search: PASS - API call made and results displayed
frontend_features.9_results_show_clinical_guidance: PASS - Bone dimensions, ranges, category, safety note
frontend_features.10_results_show_best_matches: PASS - Alpha Bio - SPI with 5mm dia, 12mm length
frontend_features.11_results_show_all_available_sizes: PASS - List of implant options with checkmarks

ui_flow_verified.navigate_to_implant_tab: PASS - Bottom navigation Implant tab works
ui_flow_verified.select_tooth_46: PASS - Tooth highlighted, info box appears
ui_flow_verified.copy_to_clipboard: PASS - Add Implant to Case button works
